name: Flavian - Colosseum of the Gladiator Beasts
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣闘獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>グラディアルビースト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>闘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>技</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>場</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－フラヴィス
name_jp_tl: Arena of the Gladial Beast - Flavius
desc: You can discard 1 card; add 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck to your hand. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, and it cannot be destroyed by battle. During the End Phase, if a "Gladiator Beast" monster was Special Summoned from your Deck this turn: You can Set 1 "Gladiator" Trap from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Flavian - Colosseum of the Gladiator Beasts" once per turn.
eff: You can discard 1 card; add 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck to your hand. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, and it cannot be destroyed by battle. During the End Phase, if a "Gladiator Beast" monster was Special Summoned from your Deck this turn: You can Set 1 "Gladiator" Trap from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Flavian - Colosseum of the Gladiator Beasts" once per turn.

attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
